name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BACKLOG-7
title: Add structured HANDOFF schema with versioning
description: The HANDOFF emitted by the subagent at completion is currently a YAML-like ad-hoc block in the prompt template. The dispatcher must parse it. No declared schema, no version, no validation. Per spec philosophy 'Machine First', every handoff should use a fixed-format schema. Define a HANDOFF schema (JSON), have the subagent emit valid JSON to .rabbit/handoff-<feature>.json, and have the dispatcher validate it before proceeding to Step 6. The current free-form text invites silent parsing drift.
